changelog:
- Version 4.5-Fireflies
🕒 Revolutionary Adaptive Lockscreen Engine
 * Next-Gen Vector Clock: Rebuilt using a vector-path pen engine supporting interactive drag and pinch-to-scale gestures.
 * Subject Collision & Raycasting: Clock digits dynamically stretch and rest perfectly on wallpaper subject edges using raycasting collision.
 * Smart Layout & Animation: Clock smoothly shrinks and moves via native ConstraintSets when notifications or media players appear.
 * Independent Date Widget: Added a standalone, draggable Date/Day widget functioning independently of the clock.
 * New Wallpapers: Included exclusive "Fireflies" wallpapers optimized for the new adaptive engine.
🎨 Material You & Next-Level Theming
 * True Monet Integration: Clock and date widgets dynamically extract dominant wallpaper colors to match Android 12+ system themes.
 * Expressive Horizon Animation: New transition animation using AGSL runtime shaders for soft background bloom, spring physics, and 3D parallax.
✨ Completely Overhauled UI & Editor
 * Material Design Refresh: Modernized layout with 36dp rounded corners, 96% scaled preview cards, and a clean ModalBottomSheet.
 * 1:1 Precision Previews: Editor previews dynamically calculate physical screen aspect ratio for exact lockscreen parity.
 * Smarter Gestures & Polish: Rewrote dragging logic with local raw coordinates; elevated FABs and toolbars above the system nav bar.
 * 12/24 Hour Sync: App preview now natively respects your system's 12/24-hour clock formatting.
🚀 Zero-Jitter Performance & Deep System Integration
 * Android 16 & LibXposed: Fully upgraded for LibXposed API 101 on Android 16; bypasses Blueprint Engine to cleanly remove OEM widgets.
 * Zero-Allocation Render Loop: Eliminated GC thrashing by caching heavy objects (Paths, Matrices) and running string generation asynchronously.
 * Direct Boot Support: Fixed "black screen on reboot" by loading assets instantly from device-protected File-Based Encryption storage.
 * AOD & Layout Jitter Fixes: Redesigned overlap prevention so notifications and AOD icons glide natively without looping or flickering.
 * Live Instant Updates: Editor changes apply instantly to the lockscreen via BroadcastReceiver without requiring a SystemUI restart.
